reviews.review_description: I just came back from the game after I got sold with my rank being master 2 5 stars to diamond 2 and the season I come back I’m already diamond.( just got back Monday )Add a rank queue in the game so the match you go in the people you go against has similar stats as yourself so it could be fair. And one more thing, start adding more cosmetics

reviews.review_title: Way to toxic and has a lot of bugs
reviews.review_description: Everyone on the game calls me the n word or calls me bad at the game l, I can never have friendly teammates. Whenever I'm goaly the ball goes through my hand on my screen, and when I don't block it my teammates call me slurs 😑

This is fun BUT whenever I go into ranked and I play gk I get blamed for selling but the ball goes through me and I get deranked I have 5 star WiFi. The owner should make a few thousands off VIP and purchases, but what he does is make more models and glazes the game on his tiktok and yt. The voice ban sucks, I hit the crossbar and it flew back into the net, I got blamed for selling and on purpose. The owner would rather use his money on models and not fix the Hitboxes. 

*if you see this, I'm not hating I'm giving my opinion so if you  see this please fix it. *

So I show respect every day if I hate them I still show respect but a guy I actually liked he believed In me. And the whole lobby reported me and I got banned for a day. Also the respect on this game is terrible this guy kept hitting it out for goal kicks then he would come and score I told him to stop. this game is straight up slop the ball goes through your hand, mechanics suck toxic kids everywhere not to mention the amount of lag you get from playing it. Trash game it's seriously impossible to have fun while playing it and i swear reports also do nothing. if you're gonna make a game at least do it right, i have also been playing this game for quite a while now but now every time i go to join it i just like lag. i will admit  i had quite a lot of fun back then. now you're just adding slop. legging the game and i'll say it again these physics are trash. fix your game.  it was a lot better when it first came out. i would definitely rate a zero if i had the option.
More....

I’ve been playing this game for 1 year by now and it still sucks, here’s why. Indoor map for soccer matches the ball spawns on the roof, like can you lower it down, plus why would you make over time 10 seconds? Like what’s wrong with you? And about the intermission sound the first one was way better, and the one now gives me goosebumps and is uncomfortable to listen to. Oh! I forgot! The toxic players, they’re so toxic. Like do you have any moderation cause all I hear is “you suck lil bro” “kys.” “what are you doing?!?” even the hard R which I could not rather say. But just for a mic ban?!??! Like at least add a ban for 1 day and get some moderation I repeat. And this game has got me nuts! Another thing about toxic it’s at least extremely legendary to find at least 1 nice person! And as I got the game someone said you suck even though I started, HOW DO THEY WANT A NOOBIE TO BE CR7??? And about the ball you don’t need to update the ball EVERY UPDATE YOU MAKE. And the ball goes through your hand 90% OF THE TIME. And basketball has a bug that makes the ball keep going through the backboard. Please fix your game!!! Where is frog roulette like that was so fun! And add big soccer into the other soccer menu!
Also please add tts to your football and baseball tutorial, like why are your tutorials so dang short? Just 3 steps and you’re done?? That’s not a tutorial make at least like 6 steps why 3?? And the stamina points omg that makes the game suck cause everyone I see has VIP. 1 STAMINA FOR WIN AND 3 FOR LOSING??! THAT IS JUST HORRIBLE. plus toxic players are teaching kids on the game bad stuff that should not be told. Telling someone to shut up is just wrong. And get rid of collision for the players! Like the collision is so bad! That people say we are so fat! And the toxic players think they’re right, this game is making their brains not good for the game. And people are playing weird and owngoaling just because we stole the ball?? I told them it’s just a game and they said “I’m selling” I REPEAT GET MODERATION. Even the toxic was so bad that someone quit the game. I witnessed that for real. And the hitboxes for the stadium bots. THEIR SO HUGE LIKE I CANNOT GET THE BALL. Also my favourite part about the game that got DELETED was the hexagons every time the barriers get hit. But DUDE SOME NAMES HAVE STUFF YOU FORGOT TO DISALLOW. LIKE “I hate hard r” WHICH IS extremely racist. Now little kids are swearing at us. And you have to pay a subscription to play with infinite stamina points? Thats greedy like per a month. And toxic kids are saying that “OH IM BETTER BECAUSE IM A HIGH RANK THAN YOU.” What? Can someone please tell me why this happens also the 1v1 maps are so small please make them bigger. YOU GOT ALOT OF IMPROVMENT TO ADD GORILLA SOCCER OR THIS GAME IS GONNA BE HELLA TOXIC. THATS why I think gorilla soccer sucks.

I havent ever even tried the online stuff but I love the solo soccer mode. A few things tho. Can you bring back where you could like knock out the bots? That was always so entertaining and a really funny part if the game. And recently there was a few days where you could hit the ball really really hard as a goalie. I dont think its there anymore but it was kind of cool. I feel like the only way this could work is if you could activate it instead of it always being on. Maybe use a button like the dash ability does? Or hold the triggers down to have extra power? idk but I liked that concept
This game fun but people be mean and they use both of their gloves is weird,and people hug the ball is unfair to other and they noskill
